name: AlgoPool

methods.name: create
methods.desc:
Deploy the contract.  Caller becomes admin.
platform: AlgoFlow wallet receiving the 5% platform cut on each entry.
Fund the app address with ALGO for box MBR before entries open. Rule of thumb: 0.019 ALGO per expected entry + 0.1 ALGO min balance.

methods.name: enter
methods.desc:
Enter the weekly draw with exactly 1 ALGO.
Returns the entry index assigned to the caller.
90% → prize_pool (in contract)  5% → lp_balance (in contract)  5% → platform   (inner txn, immediate)

methods.name: announce_draw
methods.desc:
Admin pre-commits to a future block for randomness.
Once called: no new entries accepted, draw block is public on-chain.
Block must be ≥ MIN_DRAW_GAP rounds ahead — ensures entrants cannot see or predict the block seed at entry time (Algorand VRF output is unpredictable until the block is produced).

methods.name: settle
methods.desc:
Resolve the draw using Algorand on-chain block randomness.
Callable by ANYONE after the draw block is confirmed — fully trustless.
Verification (reproducible on any Algorand node):   seed       = block(draw_block).seed   [256-bit VRF output, public]   winner_idx = btoi(extract(seed, 0, 8)) mod entry_count   winner     = entries[winner_idx]
Prize is sent automatically by inner transaction; admin cannot intercept.

methods.name: new_week
methods.desc:
Admin resets for the next weekly epoch.
Deletes all entry boxes to reclaim box MBR. Returns the new week number.
Note: if entry_count > ~700, split into multiple calls to stay within the 700 opcode budget per call.  Each box delete costs ~7 opcodes.

methods.name: deploy_lp
methods.desc:
Admin sends accumulated LP funds to a DEX pool or liquidity wallet.
Funds deepen PNET/ALGO liquidity; balance is publicly auditable on-chain.

methods.name: transfer_admin
methods.desc: Transfer admin rights — recommended to use a multisig.

methods.name: get_state
methods.desc: Returns: (current_week, entry_count, prize_pool, lp_balance, draw_block, phase)

methods.name: get_entry
methods.desc: Returns the entrant address at the given index.

desc: AlgoPool weekly prize draw. Deploy once; runs indefinitely.
